case_title: CONRAD G DEOCARIZA VS. LUX FLIGHTS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CONRAD G. DEOCARIZA RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEOCARIZA, CONRAD G

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-23-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,911.00 FILED BY DEOCARIZA, CONRAD G AS TO DEFENDANT LUX FLIGHTS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY ASSIGNEE; JAMES LEONARD LEE - JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST AS TO DEFENDANT LUX FLIGHTS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,696.00 FILED BY DEOCARIZA, CONRAD G AS TO DEFENDANT LUX FLIGHTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED MAR-25-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUX FLIGHTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEOCARIZA, CONRAD G RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUX FLIGHTS $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,110.00, PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,600 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FRAUDULENT CONDUCT TOWARD PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $928.13 ACCRUED INTEREST, $198.50 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO CREDITOR DEOCARIZA, CONRAD G
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETUN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD"
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR DEOCARIZA, CONRAD G ASSIGNED TO LEE, JAMES LEONARD DBA JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST
